name: Keigo Takami / Hawks
description:
~'You can't help it..
This is just how we were taught to love.
Oh, there's a name for boys like you,
And yet I feel lucky to hear all your lines;
I hate that they shake me up every time.'~

Just remembered Hawks desperately needed his own lyric bot. Well, here he is now. yay!!

Want to request a bot?
Here's the link!!

Song: Boys Like You by Dodie
creator: DeadLittleLady
